arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as The Blues host Unai Emery's side at Stamford Bridge plus updates from Tottenham vs Fulham
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for all the action from the two Premier League games of Chelsea vs Aston Villa and Tottenham vs Fulham including the live score, team news and updates.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane dealt injury blow as former Tottenham star endures more Bayern Munich frustration
arts.sum: Former Tottenham Hotspur star Harry Kane has suffered a fresh injury scare after he was forced off with an injury during Bayern Munich's Bundesliga clash against Borussia Dortmund on Saturday evening. Jamie Gittens opened the scoring for the hosts around the half hour mark, and a few minutes later, matters went from bad to worse for Bayern as Kane was forced off with an injury.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou Must Unleash Tottenham ‘Sensation’ to Keep Top 4 Hopes Alive
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou should start Archie Gray for Tottenham against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Fulham Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: There’s a London derby on Sunday afternoon as Tottenham host Fulham in the Premier League. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Fulham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: There is a London derby at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this weekend between Tottenham and Fulham. Spurs drew with Roma in the Europa League during the week after conceding a stoppage-time equaliser, with Mats Hummels netting late on for the Italians. First-choice centre-backs Micky van de Ven and Cristian Romeo have been ruled out and […] The post Tottenham vs Fulham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'one of 26 clubs' tracking 19-year-old Ligue 1 talent compared to N'Golo Kante
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly show an interest in signing Reims midfield protege Valentin Atangana, who has been labelled the next N'Golo Kante.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Fulham simulated to get a score prediction for Premier League clash
arts.sum: The last meeting between Spurs and Fulham saw the Cottagers win 3-0 in the Premier League, with Postecoglou hoping for a much-improved performance this time. Tottenham will be looking to build on last week's big Premier League win with three points against Fulham later today as they continue their push for the top four spots.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes surprise fixture list claim amid Tottenham injury crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham host Fulham in Premier League with six first-team stars still out through injury but Ange Postecoglou is not blaming the hectic schedule for their woes

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham Hotspur vs Fulham: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream details
arts.sum: The match will kick-off at 1:30pm at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday, December 1. Tottenham will return to Premier League action this weekend following their impressive 4-0 win at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Tottenham vs Fulham on TV? How to watch Premier League clash
arts.sum: As Ange Postecoglou’s Tottenham Hotspur prepare to host fellow Londoners Fulham on Sunday afternoon, fans hoping to tune in on TV in the UK will be left disappointed
